description: Textured leather loafers from provogue for men with a refined, stacked heel. The slim, smooth silhouetting on this stylish shoe with fuss free overlays ensures your foot-style never goes wrong. Style this with tonal, flat front trousers, a blazer and a crisp shirt. Upper Genuine textured leather upper with reinforced overlay on the heel Slip on styling with elasticated inserts on the sides of the tongue for ease of wearability Soft sockliner for instep comfort Branding on the lateral side of the midfoot Midsole Shock absorbing EVA midsole Outsole TPR outsole with a stacked heel Textured two-toned patterned grooves on the forefoot and heel for grip and traction Wash care Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth Do not machine wash
